mapper.sql: select m.modify_apply_id, m.relation_id, m.supplier_id, m.hospital_id, coalesce(nullif(trim(h.hospital_name), ''), m.hospital_name) as hospital_name, coalesce(nullif(trim(s.company_name), ''), m.supplier_name) as supplier_name, h.hospital_code as hospital_code, s.supplier_code as supplier_code, m.prev_supply_start_date, m.prev_supply_end_date, m.prev_remark, m.supply_start_date, m.supply_end_date, m.contract_no, m.apply_reason, m.contact_person, m.contact_phone, m.before_snapshot, m.audit_status, m.audit_by, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u_audit.real_name), ''), m.audit_by) as audit_by_display, m.audit_time, m.audit_remark, m.del_flag, m.del_by, m.del_time, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from scm_hospital_supplier_modify_apply m left join scm_supplier s on s.supplier_id = cast(nullif(trim(m.supplier_id), '') as unsigned) left join scm_hospital h on h.hospital_id = cast(nullif(trim(m.hospital_id), '') as unsigned) left join sys_user u_audit on (u_audit.del_flag = '0' or u_audit.del_flag is null or u_audit.del_flag = '') and (u_audit.login_name = m.audit_by or u_audit.user_name = m.audit_by or cast(u_audit.user_id as char) = m.audit_by)
mapper.insert: insert into scm_hospital_supplier_modify_apply ( modify_apply_id, relation_id, supplier_id, hospital_id, supplier_name, hospital_name, prev_supply_start_date, prev_supply_end_date, prev_remark, supply_start_date, supply_end_date, contract_no, apply_reason, contact_person, contact_phone, before_snapshot, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{modifyApplyId}, #{relationId}, #{supplierId}, #{hospitalId}, #{supplierName}, #{hospitalName}, #{prevSupplyStartDate}, #{prevSupplyEndDate}, #{prevRemark}, #{supplyStartDate}, #{supplyEndDate}, #{contractNo}, #{applyReason}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{beforeSnapshot}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{delFlag}, #{delBy}, #{delTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select count(1) from scm_hospital_supplier_modify_apply m where m.relation_id = #{relationId} and m.audit_status = '0' and (m.del_flag = '0' or m.del_flag is null)

and (m.del_flag = '0' or m.del_flag is null) and m.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} and m.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and m.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
and ( ifnull(h.hospital_code, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(h.hospital_name, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(h.pinyin_code, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(m.hospital_name, '') like concat('%', #{hospitalKeyword}, '%') )
and ( ifnull(s.supplier_code, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(s.company_name, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(s.pinyin_code, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(m.supplier_name, '') like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') )
order by m.create_time desc
